REM go into a terminal. I'll wait for 3 seconds

DELAY 3000

STRINGLN vim /tmp/test.txt

DELAY 100

STRING i

DELAY 100

SET_MIN_DELAY 5
SET_MAX_DELAY 10

STRINGLN I'm going to write a long string now, let's see how it goes

STRINGLN 

STRINGLN Should be good now
REPEAT 5

STRING Now I will test cursor movement

ESCAPE

DELAY 100

LEFTARROW
REPEAT 20

DELAY 1000

UPARROW
REPEAT 3

DELAY 1000

DOWNARROW

DELAY 1000

RIGHTARROW
REPEAT 2

DELAY 2000

STRINGLN :q!
